description: Apply a patch to an existing thread's workspace through the native file-change approval chain.

cwd.description: Working directory used to resolve relative patch paths. Defaults to the thread's configured cwd.

patch.description: Patch payload in the Codex `apply_patch` grammar (`*** Begin Patch` ... `*** End Patch`).

reason.description: Optional explanatory reason surfaced in the approval request.

threadId.description: Thread the patch is associated with. The thread must exist; the file-change approval request references this thread.

title: CodexApplyPatchParams
